Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessCandidate

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessCandidate
public class ProcessCandidate extends Object
Generated process candidate with simulation and ranking metadata.

A candidate keeps the generated NeqSim JSON definition, product stream references, generation provenance, simulation warnings/errors, objective values, and the optional built process system for downstream inspection.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Constructor Details

    • ProcessCandidate

      public ProcessCandidate(String id, String name, String generationMethod)
      Creates a process candidate.
      Parameters:
      id - stable candidate identifier
      name - human-readable candidate name
      generationMethod - method that generated the candidate

  • Method Details

    • setDescription

      public ProcessCandidate setDescription(String description)
      Sets the candidate description.
      Parameters:
      description - description text
      Returns:
      this candidate

    • setJsonDefinition

      public ProcessCandidate setJsonDefinition(String jsonDefinition)
      Sets the JSON process definition.
      Parameters:
      jsonDefinition - NeqSim JSON process definition
      Returns:
      this candidate

    • setProcessSystem

      public void setProcessSystem(ProcessSystem processSystem)
      Sets the built process system.
      Parameters:
      processSystem - built process system

    • setFeasible

      public void setFeasible(boolean feasible)
      Sets whether the candidate is feasible.
      Parameters:
      feasible - true if the candidate simulated and satisfied hard checks

    • setOptimized

      public void setOptimized(boolean optimized)
      Sets whether the candidate was optimized.
      Parameters:
      optimized - true if a decision-variable search was run

    • setDominated

      public void setDominated(boolean dominated)
      Sets whether the candidate is dominated by another candidate.
      Parameters:
      dominated - true if another candidate is at least as good and simpler or cleaner

    • setDominanceReason

      public void setDominanceReason(String dominanceReason)
      Sets the dominance reason.
      Parameters:
      dominanceReason - reason for marking the candidate dominated

    • setScore

      public void setScore(double score)
      Sets the ranking score.
      Parameters:
      score - ranking score; higher is better

    • setMetrics

      public void setMetrics(ProcessResearchMetrics metrics)
      Sets structured process research metrics.
      Parameters:
      metrics - candidate metrics

    • addProductStreamReference

      public ProcessCandidate addProductStreamReference(String role, String streamReference)
      Adds a product stream reference.
      Parameters:
      role - product role, e.g. gas, liquid, or product
      streamReference - dot-notation stream reference
      Returns:
      this candidate

    • addObjectiveValue

      public void addObjectiveValue(String name, double value)
      Adds an objective value.
      Parameters:
      name - objective name
      value - objective value

    • addSynthesisPathStep

      public ProcessCandidate addSynthesisPathStep(String step)
      Adds a synthesis path step.
      Parameters:
      step - path step description
      Returns:
      this candidate

    • addAssumption

      public ProcessCandidate addAssumption(String assumption)
      Adds an assumption.
      Parameters:
      assumption - assumption text
      Returns:
      this candidate

    • addWarning

      public void addWarning(String warning)
      Adds a warning.
      Parameters:
      warning - warning text

    • addError

      public void addError(String error)
      Adds an error.
      Parameters:
      error - error text

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the candidate id.
      Returns:
      candidate id

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the candidate name.
      Returns:
      candidate name

    • getGenerationMethod

      public String getGenerationMethod()
      Gets the generation method.
      Returns:
      generation method

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets the candidate description.
      Returns:
      description

    • getJsonDefinition

      public String getJsonDefinition()
      Gets the JSON process definition.
      Returns:
      JSON process definition

    • getProcessSystem

      public ProcessSystem getProcessSystem()
      Gets the built process system.
      Returns:
      process system, or null if not evaluated

    • isFeasible

      public boolean isFeasible()
      Returns whether the candidate is feasible.
      Returns:
      true if feasible

    • isOptimized

      public boolean isOptimized()
      Returns whether the candidate was optimized.
      Returns:
      true if optimized

    • isDominated

      public boolean isDominated()
      Returns whether this candidate is dominated.
      Returns:
      true if dominated by another candidate

    • getDominanceReason

      public String getDominanceReason()
      Gets the dominance reason.
      Returns:
      dominance reason, possibly empty

    • getScore

      public double getScore()
      Gets the ranking score.
      Returns:
      score; higher is better

    • getMetrics

      public ProcessResearchMetrics getMetrics()
      Gets structured process research metrics.
      Returns:
      process research metrics

    • getProductStreamReferences

      public Map<String,String> getProductStreamReferences()
      Gets product stream references.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable role-to-reference map

    • getProductStreamReference

      public String getProductStreamReference(String role)
      Gets a product stream reference by role.
      Parameters:
      role - product role
      Returns:
      stream reference, or null

    • getObjectiveValues

      public Map<String,Double> getObjectiveValues()
      Gets objective values.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable objective map

    • getSynthesisPath

      public List<String> getSynthesisPath()
      Gets the process synthesis path.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable synthesis path

    • getAssumptions

      public List<String> getAssumptions()
      Gets assumptions.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable assumption list

    • getWarnings

      public List<String> getWarnings()
      Gets warnings.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable warning list

    • getErrors

      public List<String> getErrors()
      Gets errors.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable error list
